channel.title: Welcome :: Christophe Pallier website
channel.description: Welcome to the Project Portal This is the main site built with Hugo. Quick Links View Technical Documentation Download the PDF Manual Use the sidebar on the left to navigate the site.

item.title: Project Overview
item.description: What is this project? This project combines the speed of Hugo for the marketing/landing pages and the power of Sphinx for technical RST-based documentation. Why two engines? Hugo: Fast, great for blogs and landing pages. Sphinx: Best-in-class for LaTeX PDF generation and technical cross-references.
